allow: Bash(cmd /c "gh pr create --title ""feat: ai-core improvements and processos operation enhancements"" --body ""## Summary\\n\\n- **ai-core**: adds telemetry, improves Obsidian RAG search, session store tests, orchestration engine test refactor, UnicodeDecodeError fix, and unimplemented status in ExecutorAgent\\n- **processos**: enriches queue row status visibility, guides operation/result states, improves audiencia backlog targeting, batches process reloads\\n- **hmadv-ops**: extends operation handling and clarifies datajud job variants\\n- **admin APIs**: minor fixes to dotobot-chat, rag-health, and lawdesk-chat exports\\n\\n## Test plan\\n\\n- [ ] Run pytest ai-core/tests/ — all tests should pass\\n- [ ] Verify processos queue page renders correct status badges\\n- [ ] Confirm hmadv-ops batch reload does not regress existing flows\\n\\n🤖 Generated with Claude Code"" 2>&1")
